goal: Commit to one outer lane from the opening, claim/support it, then mature it into an outer production factory for 1st-place wins.
main_idea: Add a stateful outer-lane sequence plan above the sample-style scorer: claim nearby lane planets, consolidate anchor/support, then project from the matured lane instead of applying only broad score bonuses. Lane modes now reserve one or two greedy budget waves before normal greedy selection.
notes: This branch intentionally moves beyond safe global center/outer tweaks. It keeps the exact scorer for launch sizing, but makes the strategic target stream stateful from the opening and prevents normal greedy selection from consuming all lane-source budget first.
